name: CAD / Drawing Preparation
description: 2D/3D modelling, drawing creation and revision

name: DFM Review
description: Design for manufacturability analysis before production

name: Laser Cutting
description: Fiber or CO2 laser flat sheet cutting

name: Plasma Cutting
description: Plasma arc cutting of flat sheet or plate

name: Waterjet Cutting
description: Abrasive waterjet cutting, outsourced or in-house

name: Shearing
description: Guillotine shear for straight cuts on flat sheet

name: Punching / Nibbling
description: CNC turret punch press or nibbling machine

name: Sawing
description: Band saw or cold saw for bar stock, tube, and profile

name: Press Brake Bending
description: CNC press brake forming of sheet metal flanges

name: Rolling
description: Three-roll or four-roll plate/sheet rolling into curves

name: Stamping / Deep Drawing
description: Press tooling for formed sheet metal shapes

name: Tube Bending
description: CNC or manual bending of round or square tube

name: Deburring / Edge Finishing
description: Manual or machine deburring of cut edges

name: Grinding / Weld Dressing
description: Angle grinder finishing of welds and surfaces

name: Shot Blasting
description: Abrasive blasting for surface preparation before coating

name: Powder Coating
description: Electrostatic powder coat application and oven cure

name: Wet Paint
description: Spray or brush liquid paint application

name: Galvanizing
description: Hot-dip or electro-galvanizing, outsourced

name: Anodizing
description: Aluminium anodizing, outsourced

name: Passivation
description: Chemical passivation of stainless steel

name: Polishing
description: Mechanical or electrochemical surface polishing

name: Surface Cleaning / Degreasing
description: Solvent or aqueous degreasing before coating or welding

name: Straightening / Flattening
description: Press or roller straightening of warped sheet or bar

name: Notching
description: Corner notching of sheet for box or frame fabrication

name: MIG / MAG Welding
description: GMAW wire-feed welding, most common structural weld process

name: TIG Welding
description: GTAW precision welding for thin sheet and stainless

name: Spot Welding
description: Resistance spot welding of overlapping sheet layers

name: Fit-up & Tack Welding
description: Fixture alignment and tack passes before full weld

name: Stud Welding
description: Drawn arc or capacitor discharge stud welding

name: Hardware Insertion
description: Press-in nuts, PEM fasteners, rivet nuts, standoffs

name: Riveting
description: Solid or blind rivet installation

name: Adhesive Bonding
description: Structural adhesive or sealant application

name: Mechanical Assembly
description: Bolted or screwed sub-assembly or final assembly

name: Cable / Wiring Harness
description: Electrical wiring, terminal crimping, harness routing

name: Pipe / Hose Routing
description: Hydraulic, pneumatic, or fluid line installation

name: CNC Milling
description: 3-axis or 4-axis CNC milling of prismatic features

name: CNC Turning / Lathe
description: Turning, facing, boring of rotational parts

name: Drilling
description: Manual or CNC drilling of through-holes and blind holes

name: Tapping / Threading
description: Internal thread cutting by hand tap or CNC rigid tapping

name: Countersinking / Counterboring
description: Conical or flat-bottom seat preparation for fastener heads

name: Reaming
description: Precision hole finishing to tight tolerance

name: Grinding (Machining)
description: Surface or cylindrical grinding to tight flatness/roundness

name: Fly Cutting / Facing
description: Fly cutter or face mill for large flat surface finishing

name: Broaching
description: Keyway, spline, or profile broaching

name: Marking / Engraving
description: Laser marking, dot-peen, or mechanical engraving of IDs

name: Dimensional Inspection
description: CMM, caliper, or gauge measurement against drawing tolerances

name: Visual Inspection / QC
description: Visual check for surface defects, weld quality, finish

name: Weld NDT
description: Non-destructive testing: dye penetrant, ultrasonic, X-ray

name: Pressure / Leak Testing
description: Hydrostatic or pneumatic pressure test of closed assemblies

name: FAT / Functional Test
description: Factory acceptance test against customer spec

name: Packaging
description: Part protection, labelling, and packing for dispatch

name: Rework / Repair
description: Corrective rework of non-conforming parts or welds

name: Procurement / Purchasing
description: Ordering raw material, bought-out parts, or outsourced ops

name: Outsourced Operation
description: Generic placeholder for any outsourced process step

name: Heat Treatment
description: Annealing, hardening, stress relieving — typically outsourced

name: 3D Scanning
description: Structured light or laser scan for reverse engineering or QC

name: 3D Printing / Additive
description: FDM, SLA, or SLS rapid prototyping

name: Prototype Build
description: First article / prototype assembly and functional test

name: Documentation / Dossier
description: As-built documentation, CE dossier, material certs, ITP

name: Shipping / Logistics
description: Freight booking, customs docs, delivery coordination
